From: Lucy Ferguson

Sent: Friday, March 28, 2025 6:58:30 AM

To: Nicholas Alton ; Peter Mandelson ; James Roscoe ; Mungo Woodifield ; Mark Newton (MOD)
(Sensitive)

Cc: JCS

Subject: Re: Letter from America

V much agree. FS will find this v useful. Did you send to a few in No10 as well?
I think we identified that the weekly moment should be accompanied by a g&t!

Get Outlook for i0S

From: Nicholas Alton
Sent: Thursday, March 27, 2025 11:48 PM
To: Peter Mandelson ; James Roscoe ; Lucy Ferguson ; Mungo Woodifield ; Mark Newton
(MOD) (Sensitive)
Cc: JCS
Subject: Re: Letter from America
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE

450

This is very good (largely because it echoes my views!). If helpful, it might be useful to 
schedule a weekly session to run through the key themes of the week to feed into your Letter 
From America
Nick
Nicholas Alton | Minister Counsellor (Political) | British Embassy Washington
3100 Massachusetts Avenue NW | Washington DC 20008

Fw: State visit

From: Peter Mandelson 
Sent: Sunday, March 30, 2025 5:48:37 PM
To: Morgan McSweeney ; Oliver Robbins 
Cc: Ailsa Terry (No.10) ; James Roscoe 
Subject: Re: State visit
Got the Ukraine point.
On SV, it helps that he agreed dates on Friday for Gulf visits in May. I will emphasize that we 
are taking SV to UK very seriously and has to be thoroughly planed etc. 
 Is it likely that September will be Windsor ?
On trade I think I have to say something like:
•
